properties.name: notify4j.global
properties.description: Whether to create the single application-wide Notifications facade from notify4j.urls. Set false in multi-tenant apps that build one facade per tenant from the injected NotificationsFactory instead.

values.description: Suppress any transition whose new status is PENDING.
Suppress any transition whose new status is RUNNING.
Suppress any transition whose new status is ASSIGNED.
PagerDuty Events API, routed to events tagged 'failed'.
